records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't ya know everythin' is possible when you're successful? Then, whaddya wanna be when you grow up, Boxie?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm.... I was thinking of working as a freelancer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm.... I was thinking of working as a freelancer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's so much in life to waste it in being a normal salaryman.

records.m_Talk_FRA: There's so much in life to waste it in being a normal salaryman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh! You're already thinkin' about the future?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh! You're already thinkin' about the future?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you're right. I can't imagine seein' you bowin' down to your boss in an ordinary company.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess you're right. I can't imagine seein' you bowin' down to your boss in an ordinary company.

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no. I just...
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no. I just...
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no. I just...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about becoming a teacher? I think you'll be good at taking care of kids, Dain.

records.m_Talk_FRA: What about becoming a teacher? I think you'll be good at taking care of kids, Dain.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... as long as you don't become an art teacher...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... I never thought about that before. And I don't know if the students will like me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... I never thought about that before. And I don't know if the students will like me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... I never thought about that before. And I don't know if the students will like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know what...? I want to work with you all and keep making games.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know what...? I want to work with you all and keep making games.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know what...? I want to work with you all and keep making games.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even after we become adults... I hope we'll still be together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even after we become adults... I hope we'll still be together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even after we become adults... I hope we'll still be together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what are ya sayin'? You're embarrassing me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what are ya sayin'? You're embarrassing me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what are ya sayin'? You're embarrassing me...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Rinae...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha. Thanks.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Chairwoman? Are you sleeping by chance?

records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Chairwoman...? Me?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. You know I haven't thought about becoming one yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Chairwoman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Chairwoman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Chairwoman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Chairwoman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Chairwoman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Chairwoman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for waking you up. Should I come back later?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for waking you up. Should I come back later?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for waking you up. Should I come back later?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... I guess I fell asleep... I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... I guess I fell asleep... I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... I guess I fell asleep... I'm sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're here because of the Halloween event, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're here because of the Halloween event, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're here because of the Halloween event, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's going smoothly. It will be a success this year as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It's going smoothly. It will be a success this year as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It's going smoothly. It will be a success this year as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some of the students are disappointed that there is no simulation event this year...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some of the students are disappointed that there is no simulation event this year...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some of the students are disappointed that there is no simulation event this year...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I assume that many were looking forward to it after the positive response it received last Christmas.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assume that many were looking forward to it after the positive response it received last Christmas.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assume that many were looking forward to it after the positive response it received last Christmas.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a <color=#ffd34c>major update</color> coming soon, so there's nothing we can do about that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a <color=#ffd34c>major update</color> coming soon, so there's nothing we can do about that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a <color=#ffd34c>major update</color> coming soon, so there's nothing we can do about that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a shame that the development period had to overlap with the event. It needs to be finished as soon as possible...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a shame that the development period had to overlap with the event. It needs to be finished as soon as possible...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a shame that the development period had to overlap with the event. It needs to be finished as soon as possible...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right. That's why I came to see you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right. That's why I came to see you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right. That's why I came to see you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tomorrow, a <color=#ffd34c>developer</color> from our partner company will be visiting in person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tomorrow, a <color=#ffd34c>developer</color> from our partner company will be visiting in person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tomorrow, a <color=#ffd34c>developer</color> from our partner company will be visiting in person.

records.m_Talk_FRA: She said she wanted the beta testing to only be done by you and their staff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... All right. I guess she's probably trying to be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... All right. I guess she's probably trying to be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... All right. I guess she's probably trying to be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry to make you work on Halloween. But it's reassuring to have you here, Yen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry to make you work on Halloween. But it's reassuring to have you here, Yen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry to make you work on Halloween. But it's reassuring to have you here, Yen.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, don't mind me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, don't mind me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You look happy today. Did anything good happen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You look happy today. Did anything good happen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You look happy today. Did anything good happen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... the developer we're meeting with today is actually a <color=#ffd34c>friend</color> of mine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... the developer we're meeting with today is actually a <color=#ffd34c>friend</color> of mine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... the developer we're meeting with today is actually a <color=#ffd34c>friend</color> of mine.

records.m_Talk_FRA: We were both so busy that we couldn't make time to meet each other. So, I'm excited to meet her today.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. It's been a long time since I saw you gleaming with joy, Ms. Chairwoman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I will come back when it's time.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I will come back when it's time.
